2604.09537.title: Case-Grounded Evidence Verification: A Framework for Constructing Evidence-Sensitive Supervision
2604.09537.paper_summary: Evidence-grounded reasoning requires more than attaching retrieved text to a prediction: a model should make decisions that depend on whether the provided evidence supports the target claim. In practice, this often fails because supervision is weak, evidence is only loosely tied to the claim, and evaluation does not test evidence dependence directly. We introduce case-grounded evidence verification, a general framework in which a model receives a local case context, external evidence, and a structured claim, and must decide whether the evidence supports the claim for that case. Our key contribution is a supervision construction procedure that generates explicit support examples together with semantically controlled non-support examples, including counterfactual wrong-state and topic-related negatives, without manual evidence annotation. We instantiate the framework in radiology and train a standard verifier on the resulting support task. The learned verifier substantially outperforms both case-only and evidence-only baselines, remains strong under correct evidence, and collapses when evidence is removed or swapped, indicating genuine evidence dependence. This behavior transfers across unseen evidence articles and an external case distribution, though performance degrades under evidence-source shift and remains sensitive to backbone choice. Overall, the results suggest that a major bottleneck in evidence grounding is not only model capacity, but the lack of supervision that encodes the causal role of evidence.
2604.09537.paper_summary_zh: 證據基礎推理需要的不僅僅是將檢索到的文本附加到預測上：模型應該根據提供的證據是否支持目標主張來做出決策。實際上，這通常失敗，因為監督較弱，證據與主張之間的聯繫僅是鬆散的，且評估並未直接測試證據依賴性。我們引入了案例基礎證據驗證，這是一個通用框架，其中模型接收本地案例上下文、外部證據和結構化主張，並必須決定該證據是否支持該案例的主張。我們的主要貢獻是一個監督構建程序，該程序生成明確的支持範例以及語義控制的非支持範例，包括反事實錯誤狀態和主題相關的負例，而無需手動證據註釋。我們在放射學中實現了該框架，並在生成的支持任務上訓練了一個標準驗證器。學習到的驗證器在性能上顯著超過僅基於案例和僅基於證據的基準，在正確證據下保持強勁，並在移除或替換證據時崩潰，顯示出真正的證據依賴性。這種行為在未見過的證據文章和外部案例分布中轉移，儘管在證據來源轉移下性能下降，並對骨幹選擇保持敏感。總體而言，結果表明，證據基礎的一個主要瓶頸不僅是模型的容量，還是缺乏編碼證據因果角色的監督。
2604.09537.author: Soroosh Tayebi Arasteh et.al.
2604.09537.authors: Soroosh Tayebi Arasteh, Mehdi Joodaki, Mahshad Lotfinia, Sven Nebelung, Daniel Truhn
